info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to damage to hurt
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ayaM BAzAyAmapi iti AtreyamEtreyAdayaH  ataH eva ' na tadyaSaH SastraBftAM kziRoti ' (raGu.) ' paYcabARaH kziRoti ' (SAku.)ityAdayaH prayogAH saNgacCante  SAkawAyanAdayaH tu CAndasatvamevAhuH  tatra ' ciriRoti riRotyevaM kziRoti jiriRoti ca  dASnoti ca dfRotyAhuH padAni cCAndasAni zaw ' iti Bawwamallavacanam (AKyAtacandrikA - 1.77) pramARam  ' kzaye kzayati hiMsAyAM kziRAtIti zito Bavet  nivAsagatyoH kziyati kziRotyAvaguRe kziRoH ' (Slo. 12- 13) iti devaH  ' ri ' DAtuM kiYcit parivartya ' kzi ' DAtuM saMyojya ' fkzi ' iti ajAdimiditaM kecana paWanti  ' fkzItyeka eva ajAdirityanye ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  tadA fkziRoti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ete vEtaM vikziRanti yaM vicikIrzanti' (Sa0 brA0 91123) kzIRamapacitaM kurvantItyAhf brAhmaRe tu SnAvikaraRo'yaM prayuktaH
